description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows x64 that triggers on push events. The workflow uses a Windows environment to build a project with various OpenCASCADE and Assimp versions, including 7.3.0-7.8.0 and 5.3.1-5.4.3 respectively. For each version combination, it checks out the code, installs Qt, caches and downloads OpenCASCADE and Assimp archives, extracts them, configures the compiler, builds the project with CMake, and executes unit tests.
